name: lms-review
description: Installable Codex plugin for reviewing LMS revise and practice data through the hosted VUIHOC MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to the hosted VUIHOC LMS MCP server for review workflows
interface.longDescription: Install this plugin to access the hosted VUIHOC LMS MCP server and bundled LMS review skill for revise or practice audits with your own VUIHOC token.
defaultPrompt: Lấy dữ liệu và review bài reverse này
